# Robots.txt para Cavanhaque
# https://cavanhaque.com

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://cavanhaque.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay para bots de SEO (permite crawling mas com delay)
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10

# Bloquear apenas bots maliciosos conhecidos
User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot-SA
Disallow: /

# Permitir explicitamente Google, Bing, etc
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
